migration_paths.recommendation: Migrate HTTP→HTTPS. If legacy, front with TLS-terminating reverse proxy and enforce redirects + HSTS where applicable.

NEXT.recommendation: Migrate management/application endpoints to HTTPS/TLS where feasible.
NEXT.title: Plaintext HTTP service detected

notes: v3.8 adds intelligence outputs (scorecard/roadmap/intelligence.json) while keeping v3.7 assessment.json stable.

wave_1.deliverable: HTTP→HTTPS migration list; TLS termination pattern selection
wave_1.rationale: Plaintext endpoints undermine identity, session security, and governance.
wave_1.title: Eliminate plaintext HTTP where feasible (especially management interfaces)

wave_1.deliverable: Inventory with owners; renewal SLAs; automation backlog (managed PKI/ACME where possible)
wave_1.rationale: Operational discipline reduces outages and enables future algorithm agility.
wave_1.title: Certificate lifecycle hygiene and ownership validation

wave_2.deliverable: TLS 1.3 enablement plan; standard cipher policy; rollout checklist
wave_2.rationale: TLS 1.3 reduces downgrade/config risk and simplifies crypto baselines.
wave_2.title: Adopt TLS 1.3 at termination points and standardize modern configs

wave_2.deliverable: Approved termination architectures (LB/WAF/Gateway patterns) + exceptions process
wave_2.rationale: Centralization improves agility: fewer places to change algorithms, keys, and policies.
wave_2.title: Centralize crypto where possible (termination/offload patterns)

wave_2.deliverable: Crypto dependency SBOM-lite; upgrade candidates; deprecation schedule
wave_2.rationale: Most PQC blockers are dependencies (libraries, runtimes, embedded stacks).
wave_2.title: Dependency and library baselining (crypto-agility workstream)

wave_3.deliverable: Vendor matrix (TLS/SSH/PKI/Signing); pilot shortlist; success criteria
wave_3.rationale: PQC readiness is vendor- and system-dependent; pilots de-risk timelines.
wave_3.title: Vendor capability mapping + PQC/hybrid pilot selection

wave_3.deliverable: Hybrid design patterns; PKI impact assessment; migration playbook draft
wave_3.rationale: Hybrid approaches are likely early path to PQC for many stacks.
wave_3.title: Hybrid key exchange and certificate strategy planning

wave_3.deliverable: Roadmap cadence; readiness KPI tracking; wave execution plan
wave_3.rationale: PQC transition is a multi-year program; governance prevents stall-out.
wave_3.title: Program governance (metrics, waves, and change management)
